message:
fix(installer): align show_completion box border

Follow-up fix to the progress display alignment commit (6cef3c5).

The "Phases completed" line in show_completion() had one fewer
space than needed, causing the right border to be slightly off.

Before:
  ║  Phases completed: 8/8                                       ║

After:
  ║  Phases completed: 8/8                                        ║

This maintains consistent 63-character content width within the
65-character box frame.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -175,7 +175,7 @@ if ! declare -f show_completion >/dev/null; then
         echo "║              ✓ Installation Complete!                         ║" >&2
         echo "╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣" >&2
         printf "║  Total time: %dm %02ds                                          ║\n" "$min" "$sec" >&2
-        printf "║  Phases completed: %d/%d                                       ║\n" "$total" "$total" >&2
+        printf "║  Phases completed: %d/%d                                        ║\n" "$total" "$total" >&2
         echo "║                                                               ║" >&2
         echo "║  NEXT STEPS:                                                  ║" >&2
         echo "║  1. Type 'exit' to disconnect                                 ║" >&2
